---
title: "Unsupervised analysis"
format: html
editor: visual
output-dir: ../output
execute:
  echo: true
---

## Community dissimilarity

This document presents the results of a microbiota project, focusing on beta diversity analysis. Specifically, we employed Principal Coordinates Analysis (PCoA) using the Bray-Curtis dissimilarity index to assess community dissimilarity among microbiota samples.

Data Preprocessing

```{r}
# Load and preprocess data
# tse <- readRDS("../data/tse.Rds")
source("funct.R")
source("data.R")
tse <- agglomerateByRanks(tse)
tse <- transformAssay(tse, method = "relabundance")
tse <- altExp(tse, "species")
```

Generate plots

```{r}
# Generate plots
beta_pcoa <- lapply(comparisons, function(comp) PCoA_plot(tse, comp, variable))
combined_plot <- wrap_plots(beta_pcoa, nrow = 2)
combined_plot
```
